messages.subject: [Bioc-devel] BioC2026 Call for Abstracts is Closing Soon
messages.subject_clean: [Bioc-devel] BioC2026 Call for Abstracts is Closing Soon
messages.body_plain:
Just a quick reminder that the Call for Abstracts for BioC2026 is currently open. Submit abstracts for workshops, posters, package demos, and short talks.

 Submission deadline: 13th March 2026

?Submit your abstract here: https://openreview.net/group?id=bioconductor.org/BioC/2026/Conference#tab-recent-activity

??Please note that the OpenReview submission system requires all submitters to create an account at least two weeks before the abstract deadline. Please register early to avoid any last-minute issues.

Find more information here: https://bioc2026.bioconductor.org/

Best regards,
Laurah Ondari
Bioconductor Community Engagement Support
Bioinformatician, International Institute of Tropical Agriculture (IITA)

messages.subject: [Bioc-devel] help with GENESIS failing build on kjohnson3
messages.subject_clean: [Bioc-devel] help with GENESIS failing build on kjohnson3
messages.body_plain:
Hi,

GENESIS is failing on the mac builder kjohnson3
<https://bioconductor.org/checkResults/devel/bioc-LATEST/GENESIS/kjohnson3-buildsrc.html>
with an error that I don't understand. It is passing on linux, as well as
every system (including macOS) on R universe
<https://bioc.r-universe.dev/GENESIS#checktable>. I don't know how to
proceed here, as I can't reproduce the error. Can anyone offer guidance? Is
there a chance that passing the R universe builds will be sufficient for
inclusion in the next Bioonductor release?

thanks,
Stephanie Gogarten

-- 

Stephanie M. Gogarten, PhD

Senior Research Scientist / Genetic Analysis Center
<https://www.biostat.washington.edu/research/centers/gac>

Department of Biostatistics <https://www.biostat.washington.edu/>

UNIVERSITY OF WASHINGTON



UW Tower Box 359461

4333 Brooklyn Ave NE, Seattle, WA 98195

206.221.0757

sdmorris at uw.edu

she/her/hers

	[[alternative HTML version deleted]]
